zh.Echingham, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可艾欽加姆
zh.Assumption of Blessed Mary and St. Nicho: 英國英格蘭素可艾欽加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William II Echyngham於1350年7月10日出生在英國素可艾欽加姆時，他的父親Sir William Echyngham17歲，母親Elizabeth Criol14歲。他於1395年之前與Alice Battisford結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1413年3月20日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可艾欽加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William II Echyngham于1350年7月10日出生在英国素可艾欽加姆时，他的父亲Sir William Echyngham17岁，母亲Elizabeth Criol14岁。他于1395年之前与Alice Battisford结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1413年3月20日在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可艾欽加姆。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William II Echyngham was born on 10 July 1350, in Etchingham, Sussex, England, his father, Sir William Echyngham, was 17 and his mother, Elizabeth Criol, was 14. He married Alice Battisford before 1395. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 20 March 1413, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Etchingham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William II Echyngham est né le 10 juillet 1350, à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Echyngham, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Criol, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Alice Battisford avant 1395. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1413, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William II Echyngham am 10. Juli 1350 in Etchingham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Echyngham 17 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Criol 14. Er hat vor 1395 Alice Battisford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. März 1413 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Etchingham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William II Echyngham è nato il il 10 luglio 1350 nel Etchingham, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir William Echyngham, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Criol, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Alice Battisford prima del 1395. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1413, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Etchingham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William II Echynghamが1350年7月10日にイギリススセックスエトチンガムで生まれた時，父Sir William Echynghamは17歳，母Elizabeth Criolは14歳であった。1395年以前にAlice Battisfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1413年3月20日に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスエトチンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William II Echyngham(이)가 1350년 7월 10일 영국 수세스 트친그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Echyngham(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Criol(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1395년 이전 Alice Battisford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1413년 3월 20일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 트친그함에 묻혔다.

pt.10 July 1350–20 March 1413: 10 de julho de 1350–20 de março de 1413
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William II Echyngham nasceu em 10 de julho de 1350, em Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Echyngham, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Criol, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Battisford antes 1395. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1413, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William II Echyngham родился 10 июля 1350 г. в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Echyngham было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Criol, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Battisford перед 1395 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 20 марта 1413 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.10 July 1350–20 March 1413: 10 de julio de 1350–20 de marzo de 1413
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William II Echyngham nació el 10 de julio de 1350, en Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Echyngham, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Criol, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Alice Battisford antes de 1395. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1413, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
